featureName: Sprint 22-30 — Deep User Experience Polish (6-hour cycle)
description: As a deep user of NeighbourGo who is both a Client and Provider, fix the most impactful UX issues: broken tests, missing task status visibility, provider onboarding gaps, chat UX, and visual polish.

userStories.title: Fix 4 Failing Unit Tests + 3 Empty Catch Blocks
userStories.description: The test suite has 4 failures and 3 empty catch blocks remaining. Fix them all.
acceptanceCriteria: Run flutter test, identify all 4 failing tests
Fix each failing test — update test to match current code or fix code if test exposed a real bug
Find and fix all 3 remaining empty catch blocks in lib/
flutter test — 0 failures
flutter analyze — 0 errors

userStories.title: Provider Onboarding — Profile Completion Checklist
userStories.description: New Providers land on ProviderHomeScreen with empty profile. Add a completion checklist card that guides them to set up avatar, categories, rates, photos.
acceptanceCriteria: Create _ProfileCompletionCard widget on ProviderHomeScreen when completenessScore < 70
Shows progress bar, checklist of missing items (avatar, headline, bio, categories, rates, availability, photo)
Each item tappable — navigates to EditProfileScreen
Card disappears when completenessScore >= 70
CTA button: 'Complete Your Profile'
flutter analyze 0 errors

userStories.title: Client Home — Status-Grouped Task Dashboard
userStories.description: Replace plain task list on PosterHomeScreen with action-oriented sections: Needs Action (new bids), In Progress, Open.
acceptanceCriteria: Group tasks by: 'Needs Your Action' (tasks with bids to review), 'In Progress', 'Open' (waiting for bids)
Each section has header with count badge
'Needs Action' cards show bid count + 'Review Bids' button
'In Progress' cards show provider name + 'Message' quick action
Empty sections hidden, keep 'Post a Task' CTA at top
flutter analyze 0 errors

userStories.title: Chat UX — Date Separators, Auto-Scroll, Message Grouping
userStories.description: Improve chat: add date separators, auto-scroll to bottom, group consecutive messages from same sender.
acceptanceCriteria: Date separators between messages on different days (Today, Yesterday, date)
Auto-scroll to bottom on open and new message
Scroll-to-bottom FAB when scrolled up with new messages
Show HH:MM time next to each bubble
Group consecutive messages from same sender (no repeated avatar)
flutter analyze 0 errors

userStories.title: Task Detail — Sticky Actions + Visual Hierarchy
userStories.description: Task detail is a wall of text. Move actions to sticky bottom bar, add card containers, prominent budget display.
acceptanceCriteria: Sticky bottom bar with primary action buttons (Submit Bid / Mark Complete / Message)
Card containers around each section with subtle shadow
Budget large font in primary color with S$ prefix
Category chip + urgency badge in horizontal row below photos
'Posted X ago' near title
Category placeholder image when no photos
flutter analyze 0 errors

userStories.title: Provider Directory — Redesigned Cards + Quick Hire
userStories.description: Provider cards need: rating stars, price, categories, and a Hire button directly on the card.
acceptanceCriteria: Card layout: avatar (left), name + headline + stars (center), Hire button (right)
Top 2 categories as small chips, starting rate 'From S$XX/hr'
Neighbourhood with location icon, review count
Card with elevation/shadow and rounded corners
Hire button initiates direct-hire flow directly
flutter analyze 0 errors

userStories.title: Services Tab in Discover — Grid View of Service Listings
userStories.description: Add 'Services' as third tab in Discover. Show service listings in 2-column grid with photos, prices, hire button.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Services' tab in DiscoverScreen (Tasks | Providers | Services)
2-column grid of service listing cards
Each card: cover photo, title, provider name, price, rating
Category filter chips at top
Tap opens ServiceDetailScreen, Hire button for quick action
Shimmer loading
flutter analyze 0 errors

userStories.title: Notification Improvements — Actions, Grouping, Mark All Read
userStories.description: Notifications need contextual action buttons, date grouping, swipe to dismiss, and mark all read.
acceptanceCriteria: Unread count badge on notification bell icon
Action button per notification type: View Bids, View Task, Reply, Leave Review
Swipe-to-dismiss marks as read
'Mark All as Read' button in AppBar
Group by date: Today, Yesterday, Earlier
flutter analyze 0 errors
